references.key: combined with the variance scaling the drift gap behaves as op nq 2 3
references.raw: Drift Gap: By Theorem 3.5, the ranking error is bounded by the estimation error: |∆r̂ − ∆r | = |AUC(r̂) − AUC(r)| ≤ √ Cε2/3 . Combined with the variance scaling, the drift gap behaves as Op ( nq ε2/3 ).
references.title: Combined with the variance scaling, the drift gap behaves as Op ( nq ε2/3 )
